chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.S- 498 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to non-prosecution. 06.09.2019. Mr. Sajid Ali Soomro, Advocate for petitioner. = Learned counsel for petitioner after arguing the matter at some length submits that he does not press this petition and will file a proper application before the learned Balochistan High Court for availing remedy against the respondents. Accordingly, this petition in terms as stated above is disposed of. JUDGE Tufail/PA
